metadata.defaultTitle: Dingli Rental | Find Your Ideal Home
metadata.description: Dingli Rental Service — Taiwan's trusted residential, office, and storefront leasing brand serving Greater Taipei, Keelung, Taoyuan, and Hsinchu. Multilingual support, professional viewings, transparent contracts.

footer.tagline: Dingli Rental Service — a professional leasing brand rooted in Greater Taipei, Keelung, Taoyuan, and Hsinchu, guiding you home with honesty, transparency, and care.
footer.addressValue: 3F-2, No. 49, Sec. 3, Zhongshan N. Rd., Zhongshan Dist., Taipei City
footer.copyright: © 2026 Dingli Rental Service Co., Ltd. All rights reserved. | Tax ID 93790198

home.featuredSub: Listings our consultants recently visited and verified in person. Start here — browse the full catalog if nothing fits.
home.whySubtitle: We don't just hand you the keys — from viewings and negotiations to lease signing and post-move support, Dingli's human consultants stay with you every step.
home.why01Desc: Familiar with every business district across Taipei, New Taipei, Taoyuan, and Hsinchu — no overpaying.
home.why02Desc: Same consultant from viewing to signing — no being passed around.
home.why03Desc: Every listing personally inspected — no fake photos, no inflated specs.
home.why04Desc: Repairs, deposit returns, lease renewals — we stay your reliable backup.
home.testimonialsSub: Every viewing and signing matters. Here's what tenants have to say.

testimonials.name: Sarah W.
testimonials.quote: Just relocated from Singapore — Dingli walked me through every clause in plain English and helped negotiate pet-friendly terms. Moved in within a week.

testimonials.name: Mark R.
testimonials.quote: Found a serviced office near MRT in three viewings. Transparent fees, no surprises at signing.

testimonials.name: Yumi T.
testimonials.quote: Got a bilingual lease and a consultant who actually replied within hours. That's not standard around here.

properties.pageSubtitle: Hand-picked listings across Greater Taipei, Keelung, Taoyuan, and Hsinchu — every unit personally verified by our consultants.
properties.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters, or talk to a consultant:

propertyFilters.searchPlaceholder: District, MRT line, community, or keyword

contact.pageSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about household size, commute, lifestyle, etc.
contact.formSubmitFailed: Submission failed. Please try again later or call us.

propertyDetail.locationDisclaimer: ⓘ For privacy, the map shows the neighborhood only. Contact our consultant for the exact address.

servicesPage.heroSubtitle: From the first viewing to post-move support, our consultants put people first and stand by every tenant.
servicesPage.feat1Desc: Consultants come on-site to walk you through condition and neighborhood.
servicesPage.feat2Desc: Every fee laid out upfront — no hidden surprises.
servicesPage.feat3Desc: Translated lease available for international tenants to review.
servicesPage.feat4Desc: Every unit personally inspected — no fake or stale postings.
servicesPage.feat5Desc: We help with rent, repairs, pet-friendly clauses, and more.
servicesPage.feat6Desc: We listen first, then recommend — only the right fits.
servicesPage.feat7Desc: Repairs, deposits, renewals — we stay engaged.
servicesPage.feat8Desc: LINE, call, or email — replies within the day.
servicesPage.ctaSub: Tell us what you need and a consultant will reach out today to arrange viewings.

careersPage.ctaSendResumeAfter: with the position name in the subject line.
careersPage.positionsClosedDesc: Dingli careers are temporarily closed. New roles will be posted here when available.

legal.zhOnlyNotice: This legal document is provided in Traditional Chinese only (governed by Republic of China law with Taiwan New Taipei District Court as the venue). For translation assistance please contact a consultant.
